fields.title: Fail fast on invalid mode-agent tool config
fields.description: Spawning deep currently fails at runtime with 'Invalid tools for agent "deep": memory' because mode-agent tool config and worker tool inventory diverged. Tau should validate agent/tool configuration during startup so pi never starts with invalid agent definitions. First fix validation/startup failure behavior; do not paper over it by adding memory to worker sessions.
fields.notes: Implemented startup fail-fast validation for resolved agent configurations before tau runtime starts. Validation now checks every resolved agent (including mode-agent settings overrides) for unavailable tools and unknown spawn targets, reports invalid configuration with a user-visible custom message, and exits before runTau starts. Added regression tests for invalid deep.tools override and for async startup ordering/message behavior.
fields.close_reason: Tau now validates resolved agent config before startup, shows invalid-config message to the user, and exits before starting the runtime. Regression tests cover invalid deep.tools overrides and async startup ordering.
